title: Neek's Realistic Modpack
description: Using mods to make Minecraft more realistic, and satisfying.
body:
Using mods to make Minecraft more realistic, and satisfying. Originally created for a friend, but later made available to the public.

Such mods include:
- Physics mod
- Iris Shaders
- Effective
- Presence Footsteps
- Blur
- Continuity
- Eating Animation
- Falling Leaves
- Immersive Portals
- LambDynamicLights
- NotEnoughAnimations
- Spawn Animations
- ..and more


### SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS
Physics mod and ImmersiveProtals are both heavy mods, so here are the requirements I recommend:

| Resource | Minimum | Recommended |
| ---- | ------- | --------------------- |
| CPU  | ?       | 4C/8T (Quad-core CPU) |
| RAM  | 2~2.5GB (Free/Unused RAM) | 4GB                   |
| VRAM | 2GB     | +2GB                  |


### NEED HELP?
Need help, want to request a mod addition or ask a question? **Create a new issue [here](https://github.com/neek8044/modpack-issues/issues)**
